TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Juan_Orlando_Hern√°ndez, title = Juan_Orlando_Hern√°ndez, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Juan_Orlando_Hern√°ndez} }

S.FORM: = Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez = Mntucing hngkawas 1968 idas 10 jiyax 28 ka Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Honduras ta sayang o kiya ka Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 1 jiyax 27 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado = Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado (Kari Spain: Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado; pnhnang kari Spain: (xwan o…ĺ'lando e…ĺ'nandes alő≤a'…ĺa√įo), slxan dha matas JOH; kngkawas 1968 idas 10 diyax 28-), Honduras seyjicya mi sediq snbari, kngkawas 2013 cida kcka Honduras soto seyngkyo wada mbiyax mangal, kngkawas 2014 idas 1 diyax 27 mniq sotu Degucigalpa Qnlhangan Tiyucang muda psdhu phiyu soto. Hiya u pawsopay cngtang Kokominto cngweyn, brah cida han pa mnkngkawas 2010 dhuq kngkawas 2013 ngalan Kokomin Gikay gicyo. Kndusan Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado u mnqpahun ryusu, mnhdu muyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Pnhiyu Qnlhangan Cucu Honduras Horicu Si, kngkawas 1988 dhuq kngkawas 1989 wada phyuwan mpuyas huy cusi, babaw niya daw mniq Pyasan Tubeyhing Pnhyuwan New Yurk Co mnhdu muyas Syakay mi Horicu Koswey keyngkyo pnyasan, wada dhguq mangal kongkong kwanri swosu sweywey. Hiya u mniq alang niya nanaq muda pmpah phuma qnpahan kahuy, kiya uri u niqan ka qpahan niya sanan mimah sinaw, pradiyo mi qpahun ptreybi. Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado pa niqan bay hnhanga mniq seyji Honduras 'Mbbiyax Pay' seyjicya, bukung Mtrawah Tang Rafael Pineda Ponce u muda smnru hiya pa taxa 'Laqi Wada Lhayan' (cipote malcriado). Kngkawas 2001 cida, Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado u wada mnLempira Sng Kokominto na giying, kngkawas 2010 idas 1 diyax 21 Kokominto mniq seyngkyo kwohuy cida wada mangal hbaraw hiyi giying, mniq babaw tu4 diyax daw wada psdhuwan phiyu Honduras Kokomin Gikay gicyo ka hiya. Kngkawas 2012 cida, Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado mi kicka tang dha Ricardo Alvarez muda pnsung, smatang mkngkawas 2013 Kokominto na soto hosweynjn, hiti daw Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado ka wada mbiyax kngkawas 2012 idas 11 na kcka tang seyngkyo. Mniq kngkawas 2013 idas 5 diyax 3 na 1 kcka patas smniling minyi tyawca pa, ya bay musa mangal 18% hyo ka hiya. Kngkawas 2013 idas 7 cida Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado u prading muda seyngding soto seyngkyo niya, mniq kngkawas 2013 idas 11 diyax 24 kcka seyngkyo soto cida, Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado wada mangal 36.89% hyo mbiyax mangal mi psdhuwan phiyu soto, kiya mi iyax diyax bqpahun niya soto u dhuq kngkawas 2018 idas 1 diyax 27 mnhdu. Pusu balay muda pnsung hiya ka Mtrawah mi Snburah Phiyu Tang (LIBRE) soto hosweynjn Xiomara Castro de Zelaya u 28.79% wada ini baka, binaw hiya u ini sruwa ini baka, muri balay meysa seyngkyo yingkay tbrinah smpu knkana hyo dungan. Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado u mniq kngkawas 2014 idas 1 diyax 27 muda pkla kari pnsdhuwan cida rmngaw, hiya pa muda mbiyax balay muda muru kari pnyahan niya seyngkyo cida ccng kangring mi pusu qpahun, smbiyax tuhuy Amirika, Mexico mi ssiyaw qnlhangan na cyuyu msupu qmpah, lmutuc sntama biyax heytay mi keysacu pkmalu kndudul mqnaqah ka qnbliqan syakay, pkrana qpahun seyhu, pdudul pkrana keyjay qnlhangan, pkdakil mpqpah ryu, pklihun ka mqrinuc sediq piri, psbalay quri saking qnlhangan. Soto Columbia Santos, soto Panama Martinelli, soto Costa Rica Chinchilla mi mk56 qnlhangan mi snkulan rmirih psliyan kwoci u miyah tumal pnsdhuwan phiyu soto Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado kana. Cida u niqan mkbkuy hantay tang Mtrawah mi Snburah Phiyu Tang na mpdkuh pa musa sotu mkelu muda kangyi tmhri, msang pnklanan ccng niya Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado. Uuda swey u mniq mtbaly bay muda, ini uda mquri mrrudu. Kngkawas 2017 cida muda knbeyhing seyngkyo soto ka Honduras, muda dalih 1 idas ka rmawah hyo mi tmawa cida, idas 12 diyax 17, tubaraw balay seyngkyo hwating ka pkla kari Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado ka mangal 42.95 hyo wada mbiyax tikuh balay Hantay Tucay Hatay Pay Ryeynmong Salvador Naslaya ka 41.42 mnangal na hyo, kiya wada lmutuc soto dungan. Keyngko Mniq kngkawas 2019 Cyokoku Uhan Narux Punu Brah (COVID-19) bnbur narux iyax cida, Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado u mniq kngkawas 2020 idas 6 diyax 17 pkla kari hiya mi qridin niya Ana Cyasia Kariyas u wada ruwan narux Uhan Narux Punu Brah (COVID-19) kana. Pnyahan pnatas Tnhjil kari seejiq Watan Diro mtabug.
S.PHON: = …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax ** ka …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan ńßondu…ĺas ta sajaŇč o kija ka …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô*, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado = …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado (ka…ĺi spain: …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado; pnńßnaŇč ka…ĺi spain: (xwan o…ĺ'lando …ô…ĺ'nand…ôs al*a'…ĺa*o), slxan dńßa matas …üońß; kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax **-), ńßondu…ĺas s…ô…üi ¶ja mi s…ôdiq snba…ĺi, kŇčkawas **** ¶ida k ¶ka ńßondu…ĺas soto s…ôŇčkjo wada mbijax maŇčal, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mniq sotu d…ôgu ¶igalpa qnlńßaŇčan tiju ¶aŇč muda psdńßu pńßiju soto. ńßija u pawsopaj ¶ŇčtaŇč kokominto ¶Ňčw…ôn, b…ĺańß ¶ida ńßan pa mnkŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** Ňčalan kokomin gikaj gi ¶jo. kndusan …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado u mnqpańßun …ĺjusu, mnńßdu mujas pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč pnńßiju qnlńßaŇčan ¶u ¶u ńßondu…ĺas ńßo…ĺi ¶u si, kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** wada pńßjuwan mpujas ńßuj ¶usi, babaw nija daw mniq pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč pnńßjuwan n…ôw ju…ĺk ¶o mnńßdu mujas sjakaj mi ńßo…ĺi ¶u kosw…ô k…ôŇčkjo pnjasan, wada dńßguq maŇčal koŇčkoŇč kwan…ĺi swosu sw…ôw…ô. ńßija u mniq alaŇč nija nanaq muda pmpańß pńßuma qnpańßan kańßuj, kija u…ĺi u niqan ka qpańßan nija sanan mimańß sinaw, p…ĺadijo mi qpańßun pt…ĺ…ôbi. …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado pa niqan baj ńßnńßaŇča mniq s…ô…üi ńßondu…ĺas 'mbbijax paj' s…ô…üi ¶ja, bukuŇč mt…ĺawańß taŇč …ĺa*a…ôl pin…ôda pon ¶…ô u muda smn…ĺu ńßija pa taxa 'laqi wada lńßajan' ( ¶ipot…ô mal ¶…ĺiado). kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado u wada mnl…ômpi…ĺa sŇč kokominto na gijiŇč, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** kokominto mniq s…ôŇčkjo kwońßuj ¶ida wada maŇčal ńßba…ĺaw ńßiji gijiŇč, mniq babaw tu* dijax daw wada psdńßuwan pńßiju ńßondu…ĺas kokomin gikaj gi ¶jo ka ńßija. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado mi ki ¶ka taŇč dńßa …ĺi ¶a…ĺdo al*a…ĺ…ô* muda pnsuŇč, smataŇč mkŇčkawas **** kokominto na soto ńßosw…ôn…ün, ńßiti daw …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado ka wada mbijax kŇčkawas **** idas ** na k ¶ka taŇč s…ôŇčkjo. mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * na * k ¶ka patas smniliŇč minji tjaw ¶a pa, ja baj musa maŇčal **% ńßjo ka ńßija. kŇčkawas **** idas * ¶ida …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado u p…ĺadiŇč muda s…ôŇčdiŇč soto s…ôŇčkjo nija, mniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ** k ¶ka s…ôŇčkjo soto ¶ida, …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado wada maŇčal **.**% ńßjo mbijax maŇčal mi psdńßuwan pńßiju soto, kija mi ijax dijax bqpańßun nija soto u dńßuq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mnńßdu. pusu balaj muda pnsuŇč ńßija ka mt…ĺawańß mi snbu…ĺańß pńßiju taŇč (lib…ĺ…ô) soto ńßosw…ôn…ün xioma…ĺa ¶ast…ĺo d…ô *…ôlaja u **.**% wada ini baka, binaw ńßija u ini s…ĺuwa ini baka, mu…ĺi balaj m…ôsa s…ôŇčkjo jiŇčkaj tb…ĺinańß smpu knkana ńßjo duŇčan. …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** muda pkla ka…ĺi pnsdńßuwan ¶ida …ĺmŇčaw, ńßija pa muda mbijax balaj muda mu…ĺu ka…ĺi pnjańßan nija s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida ¶ ¶Ňč kaŇč…ĺiŇč mi pusu qpańßun, smbijax tuńßuj ami…ĺika, m…ôxi ¶o mi ssijaw qnlńßaŇčan na ¶juju msupu qmpańß, lmutu ¶ sntama bijax ńß…ôtaj mi k…ôsa ¶u pkmalu kndudul mqnaqańß ka qnbliqan sjakaj, pk…ĺana qpańßun s…ôńßu, pdudul pk…ĺana k…ô…üaj qnlńßaŇčan, pkdakil mpqpańß …ĺju, pklińßun ka mq…ĺinu ¶ s…ôdiq pi…ĺi, psbalaj qu…ĺi sakiŇč qnlńßaŇčan. soto ¶olumbia santos, soto panama ma…ĺtin…ôlli, soto ¶osta …ĺi ¶a ¶ńßin ¶ńßilla mi mk** qnlńßaŇčan mi snkulan …ĺmi…ĺińß pslijan kwo ¶i u mijańß tumal pnsdńßuwan pńßiju soto …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado kana. ¶ida u niqan mkbkuj ńßantaj taŇč mt…ĺawańß mi snbu…ĺańß pńßiju taŇč na mpdkuńß pa musa sotu mk…ôlu muda kaŇčji tmńß…ĺi, msaŇč pnklanan ¶ ¶Ňč nija …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado. uuda sw…ô u mniq mtbalj baj muda, ini uda mqu…ĺi m…ĺ…ĺudu. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida muda knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo soto ka ńßondu…ĺas, muda dalińß * idas ka …ĺmawańß ńßjo mi tmawa ¶ida, idas ** dijax **, tuba…ĺaw balaj s…ôŇčkjo ńßwatiŇč ka pkla ka…ĺi …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado ka maŇčal **.** ńßjo wada mbijax tikuńß balaj ńßantaj tu ¶aj ńßataj paj …ĺj…ônmoŇč sal*ado…ĺ naslaja ka **.** mnaŇčal na ńßjo, kija wada lmutu ¶ soto duŇčan. k…ôŇčko mniq kŇčkawas **** ¶jokoku uńßan na…ĺux punu b…ĺańß ( ¶o*id-**) bnbu…ĺ na…ĺux ijax ¶ida, …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** pkla ka…ĺi ńßija mi q…ĺidin nija ana ¶jasia ka…ĺijas u wada …ĺuwan na…ĺux uńßan na…ĺux punu b…ĺańß ( ¶o*id-**) kana. pnjańßan pnatas tnńß…üil ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq watan di…ĺo mtabug.
S.FORM: = Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez = Mntucing hngkawas 1968 idas 10 jiyax 28 ka Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Honduras ta sayang o kiya ka Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 1 jiyax 27 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado = Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado (Kari Spain: Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado; pnhnang kari Spain: (xwan o…ĺ'lando e…ĺ'nandes alő≤a'…ĺa√įo), slxan dha matas JOH; kngkawas 1968 idas 10 diyax 28-), Honduras seyjicya mi sediq snbari, kngkawas 2013 cida kcka Honduras soto seyngkyo wada mbiyax mangal, kngkawas 2014 idas 1 diyax 27 mniq sotu Degucigalpa Qnlhangan Tiyucang muda psdhu phiyu soto. Hiya u pawsopay cngtang Kokominto cngweyn, brah cida han pa mnkngkawas 2010 dhuq kngkawas 2013 ngalan Kokomin Gikay gicyo. Kndusan Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado u mnqpahun ryusu, mnhdu muyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Pnhiyu Qnlhangan Cucu Honduras Horicu Si, kngkawas 1988 dhuq kngkawas 1989 wada phyuwan mpuyas huy cusi, babaw niya daw mniq Pyasan Tubeyhing Pnhyuwan New Yurk Co mnhdu muyas Syakay mi Horicu Koswey keyngkyo pnyasan, wada dhguq mangal kongkong kwanri swosu sweywey. Hiya u mniq alang niya nanaq muda pmpah phuma qnpahan kahuy, kiya uri u niqan ka qpahan niya sanan mimah sinaw, pradiyo mi qpahun ptreybi. Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado pa niqan bay hnhanga mniq seyji Honduras 'Mbbiyax Pay' seyjicya, bukung Mtrawah Tang Rafael Pineda Ponce u muda smnru hiya pa taxa 'Laqi Wada Lhayan' (cipote malcriado). Kngkawas 2001 cida, Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado u wada mnLempira Sng Kokominto na giying, kngkawas 2010 idas 1 diyax 21 Kokominto mniq seyngkyo kwohuy cida wada mangal hbaraw hiyi giying, mniq babaw tu4 diyax daw wada psdhuwan phiyu Honduras Kokomin Gikay gicyo ka hiya. Kngkawas 2012 cida, Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado mi kicka tang dha Ricardo Alvarez muda pnsung, smatang mkngkawas 2013 Kokominto na soto hosweynjn, hiti daw Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado ka wada mbiyax kngkawas 2012 idas 11 na kcka tang seyngkyo. Mniq kngkawas 2013 idas 5 diyax 3 na 1 kcka patas smniling minyi tyawca pa, ya bay musa mangal 18% hyo ka hiya. Kngkawas 2013 idas 7 cida Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado u prading muda seyngding soto seyngkyo niya, mniq kngkawas 2013 idas 11 diyax 24 kcka seyngkyo soto cida, Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado wada mangal 36.89% hyo mbiyax mangal mi psdhuwan phiyu soto, kiya mi iyax diyax bqpahun niya soto u dhuq kngkawas 2018 idas 1 diyax 27 mnhdu. Pusu balay muda pnsung hiya ka Mtrawah mi Snburah Phiyu Tang (LIBRE) soto hosweynjn Xiomara Castro de Zelaya u 28.79% wada ini baka, binaw hiya u ini sruwa ini baka, muri balay meysa seyngkyo yingkay tbrinah smpu knkana hyo dungan. Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado u mniq kngkawas 2014 idas 1 diyax 27 muda pkla kari pnsdhuwan cida rmngaw, hiya pa muda mbiyax balay muda muru kari pnyahan niya seyngkyo cida ccng kangring mi pusu qpahun, smbiyax tuhuy Amirika, Mexico mi ssiyaw qnlhangan na cyuyu msupu qmpah, lmutuc sntama biyax heytay mi keysacu pkmalu kndudul mqnaqah ka qnbliqan syakay, pkrana qpahun seyhu, pdudul pkrana keyjay qnlhangan, pkdakil mpqpah ryu, pklihun ka mqrinuc sediq piri, psbalay quri saking qnlhangan. Soto Columbia Santos, soto Panama Martinelli, soto Costa Rica Chinchilla mi mk56 qnlhangan mi snkulan rmirih psliyan kwoci u miyah tumal pnsdhuwan phiyu soto Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado kana. Cida u niqan mkbkuy hantay tang Mtrawah mi Snburah Phiyu Tang na mpdkuh pa musa sotu mkelu muda kangyi tmhri, msang pnklanan ccng niya Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado. Uuda swey u mniq mtbaly bay muda, ini uda mquri mrrudu. Kngkawas 2017 cida muda knbeyhing seyngkyo soto ka Honduras, muda dalih 1 idas ka rmawah hyo mi tmawa cida, idas 12 diyax 17, tubaraw balay seyngkyo hwating ka pkla kari Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado ka mangal 42.95 hyo wada mbiyax tikuh balay Hantay Tucay Hatay Pay Ryeynmong Salvador Naslaya ka 41.42 mnangal na hyo, kiya wada lmutuc soto dungan. Keyngko Mniq kngkawas 2019 Cyokoku Uhan Narux Punu Brah (COVID-19) bnbur narux iyax cida, Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez Alvarado u mniq kngkawas 2020 idas 6 diyax 17 pkla kari hiya mi qridin niya Ana Cyasia Kariyas u wada ruwan narux Uhan Narux Punu Brah (COVID-19) kana. Pnyahan pnatas Tnhjil kari seejiq Watan Diro mtabug.

¶u kosw…ô k…ôŇčkjo pnjasan, wada dńßguq maŇčal koŇčkoŇč kwan…ĺi swosu sw…ôw…ô. ńßija u mniq alaŇč nija nanaq muda pmpańß pńßuma qnpańßan kańßuj, kija u…ĺi u niqan ka qpańßan nija sanan mimańß sinaw, p…ĺadijo mi qpańßun pt…ĺ…ôbi. …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado pa niqan baj ńßnńßaŇča mniq s…ô…üi ńßondu…ĺas 'mbbijax paj' s…ô…üi ¶ja, bukuŇč mt…ĺawańß taŇč …ĺa*a…ôl pin…ôda pon ¶…ô u muda smn…ĺu ńßija pa taxa 'laqi wada lńßajan' ( ¶ipot…ô mal ¶…ĺiado). kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado u wada mnl…ômpi…ĺa sŇč kokominto na gijiŇč, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** kokominto mniq s…ôŇčkjo kwońßuj ¶ida wada maŇčal ńßba…ĺaw ńßiji gijiŇč, mniq babaw tu* dijax daw wada psdńßuwan pńßiju ńßondu…ĺas kokomin gikaj gi ¶jo ka ńßija. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado mi ki ¶ka taŇč dńßa …ĺi ¶a…ĺdo al*a…ĺ…ô* muda pnsuŇč, smataŇč mkŇčkawas **** kokominto na soto ńßosw…ôn…ün, ńßiti daw …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado ka wada mbijax kŇčkawas **** idas ** na k ¶ka taŇč s…ôŇčkjo. mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * na * k ¶ka patas smniliŇč minji tjaw ¶a pa, ja baj musa maŇčal **% ńßjo ka ńßija. kŇčkawas **** idas * ¶ida …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado u p…ĺadiŇč muda s…ôŇčdiŇč soto s…ôŇčkjo nija, mniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ** k ¶ka s…ôŇčkjo soto ¶ida, …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado wada maŇčal **.**% ńßjo mbijax maŇčal mi psdńßuwan pńßiju soto, kija mi ijax dijax bqpańßun nija soto u dńßuq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mnńßdu. pusu balaj muda pnsuŇč ńßija ka mt…ĺawańß mi snbu…ĺańß pńßiju taŇč (lib…ĺ…ô) soto ńßosw…ôn…ün xioma…ĺa ¶ast…ĺo d…ô *…ôlaja u **.**% wada ini baka, binaw ńßija u ini s…ĺuwa ini baka, mu…ĺi balaj m…ôsa s…ôŇčkjo jiŇčkaj tb…ĺinańß smpu knkana ńßjo duŇčan. …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** muda pkla ka…ĺi pnsdńßuwan ¶ida …ĺmŇčaw, ńßija pa muda mbijax balaj muda mu…ĺu ka…ĺi pnjańßan nija s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida ¶ ¶Ňč kaŇč…ĺiŇč mi pusu qpańßun, smbijax tuńßuj ami…ĺika, m…ôxi ¶o mi ssijaw qnlńßaŇčan na ¶juju msupu qmpańß, lmutu ¶ sntama bijax ńß…ôtaj mi k…ôsa ¶u pkmalu kndudul mqnaqańß ka qnbliqan sjakaj, pk…ĺana qpańßun s…ôńßu, pdudul pk…ĺana k…ô…üaj qnlńßaŇčan, pkdakil mpqpańß …ĺju, pklińßun ka mq…ĺinu ¶ s…ôdiq pi…ĺi, psbalaj qu…ĺi sakiŇč qnlńßaŇčan. soto ¶olumbia santos, soto panama ma…ĺtin…ôlli, soto ¶osta …ĺi ¶a ¶ńßin ¶ńßilla mi mk** qnlńßaŇčan mi snkulan …ĺmi…ĺińß pslijan kwo ¶i u mijańß tumal pnsdńßuwan pńßiju soto …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado kana. ¶ida u niqan mkbkuj ńßantaj taŇč mt…ĺawańß mi snbu…ĺańß pńßiju taŇč na mpdkuńß pa musa sotu mk…ôlu muda kaŇčji tmńß…ĺi, msaŇč pnklanan ¶ ¶Ňč nija …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado. uuda sw…ô u mniq mtbalj baj muda, ini uda mqu…ĺi m…ĺ…ĺudu. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida muda knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo soto ka ńßondu…ĺas, muda dalińß * idas ka …ĺmawańß ńßjo mi tmawa ¶ida, idas ** dijax **, tuba…ĺaw balaj s…ôŇčkjo ńßwatiŇč ka pkla ka…ĺi …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado ka maŇčal **.** ńßjo wada mbijax tikuńß balaj ńßantaj tu ¶aj ńßataj paj …ĺj…ônmoŇč sal*ado…ĺ naslaja ka **.** mnaŇčal na ńßjo, kija wada lmutu ¶ soto duŇčan. k…ôŇčko mniq kŇčkawas **** ¶jokoku uńßan na…ĺux punu b…ĺańß ( ¶o*id-**) bnbu…ĺ na…ĺux ijax ¶ida, …üuan o…ĺlando ńß…ô…ĺn*nd…ô* al*a…ĺado u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** pkla ka…ĺi ńßija mi q…ĺidin nija ana ¶jasia ka…ĺijas u wada …ĺuwan na…ĺux uńßan na…ĺux punu b…ĺańß ( ¶o*id-**) kana. pnjańßan pnatas tnńß…üil ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq watan di…ĺo mtabug.
